hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || true

cat >/dev/null || true; command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph status --repo "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
